title: Analytics - Support App Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Support > App screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon or navigate to the Account / Settings section.
4. Tap on 'App' within the Support section to open the Support > App screen.
5. Observe that the app logs an analytics event upon opening the Support > App screen.
6. Wait a few hours, then log into Firebase Analytics for the Poly Studio Mobile app project.
7. Navigate to the Events dashboard in Firebase Analytics.
8. Verify that the analytics event appears with tracked metrics: event count, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The analytics event is logged when the user opens Support > App screen. The event data (event count, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) is viewable in Firebase Analytics after a few hours delay.
